title: Dense Meaty Slovakian Pork Kebabs
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring pork back ribs, mustard, and a cure, served in scallop shells, perfect for a post-workout meal. This high-protein friendly dish is aerated and full of flavor.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together mustard, cure, brown sugar, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pork back ribs to the bowl and toss to coat with the mustard mixture.
Thread the coated pork onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 20 minutes, turning occasionally.
While the pork is cooking, prepare the scallop shells by rinsing them under cold water.
Once the pork is cooked, remove it from the grill and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the pork in the scallop shells, garnished with fresh parsley.
